PowerShell($services = @\("catalog-service","inventory-service","cart-service","order-service","payment-service","shipping-service","review-service","notification-service","api-gateway"\); foreach \($s in $services\) { $log = docker logs $s --tail 3 2>&1 | Select-String "Started|ERROR|failed|Starting" | Select-Object -Last 1; Write-Host "$s`: $\($log.Line.Trim\(\)\)" })
